titleStmt.title: SII 7.353: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 353. (A.R. No. 156 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē(ṁ) namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracā
ravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē(t) . svasti śrī [.] jayā
bhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1312 va¨rtamāna suklasaṁvatsarada kuṁbhamāsa
23 neya guruvāradaṁdu rājādhirāja paramēśvara Arirāyavibāḍa bhāṣe
getappuvarāyaragaṁḍa Uttara dakṣiṇa paścima samudrādhipati śrīvīraharihara
mahārāyara nirūpadiṁ mallappaOḍeyaru bārakūrarājyava pratipālaneya
māḍuva kāladalli maṇigāṟakēriyoḷage sōmaiyadēvara saṁnidhiyelu dēvara
Ārōgaṇeya sameyakke dōrājara baḷiya kaṁkaṇitiya makkaḷu beṁmaṁṇaseṭṭi
beṁmaṁṇaseṭṭiya taṁma mādaseṭṭiyū rudrapūjege brāhmaṇabhōjanakke
ja 4 kaṁ koṭṭaṁthā bāḷina vivara hāruṁjeyoḷage tāU badda brahmadāyada mū
lada bāḷu mūḍalu koḷagaddeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Aḍeyittiyavara
bāḷiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu Uppūraholaniṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kastūriya
haravariyiṁ teṁkalu yi(ṁ)ntī cutussīmeyoḷaguḷḷaṁthā beṭṭu mekke bittuva be
degaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 24 kaṁ naḍasuva gēṇi kālakālakke nāghaṁḍuga
dalu bhatta mu 110 mattaṁ mūḍalu mēkaṁṭana maneyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baya
la māvinagadde 1 kkaṁ bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 2 kaṁ naḍasuva
gēṇi bhatte nāghaṁḍugadalu mu 15 yi(ṁ)ntī catussīmeyoḷaguḷḷaṁthā ma
ra phala halasu māU teṁgu nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Oḷagāgi yēnuḷḷaṁthādu
yi dha¨rmmakke naḍadubahudu . mattaṁ śivarātreya taḷuhinadīvige Eṁṇe hā
ḍa 3 yi rudrapūje śivarātreya dha¨rmmavanu beṁmaṇaseṭṭi beṁmaṁṇa
seṭṭiya saṁtānadavaru naḍasibaharu . yi dha¨rmmada Ārayike maṇigāṟa
kēriya mūvaru seṭṭikāṟaru nūṟayivattu yeḷameyoḷagā
da samasta halaru Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyiyāgi pālisibaharu . ślōka .
dānapālanayō¨rmmadhyē dānātthēyōnrupālanaṁ . dānāpsva¨rggamavāpnō
ti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harē
ca vasuṁdharā[ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭi¨rvvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 7.353 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
